tag.name: CR - fwd ecom events to endpoint

parameter.value:
<script>
(function () {
  if (!window.fetch || !window.TERRA_TRACK_ENDPOINT) return;

  var ev = "{{Event}}";

  // Forward only theme ecommerce events
  if (ev !== "view_item_list" && ev !== "view_item" && ev !== "add_to_cart") return;

  var dl = window.dataLayer || [];
  var e = null;

  for (var i = dl.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
    if (dl[i] && dl[i].event === ev) {
      e = dl[i];
      break;
    }
  }
  if (!e) return;

  try {
    fetch(window.TERRA_TRACK_ENDPOINT, {
      method: "POST",
      headers: { "content-type": "application/json" },
      body: JSON.stringify({
        data_source: "gtm",
        event_name: e.event,
        event_id: e.event_id || null,
        event_time: e.timestamp || null,
        raw: e
      }),
      keepalive: true
    });
  } catch (_) {}
})();
</script>
